User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile information and preferences.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

createdAt.description: The time the user profile was created.

Interview.title: Interview Session
Interview.description: Represents a single mock interview session.

id.description: The unique ID of the interview.

userId.description: The ID of the user who took the interview.

role.description: The job role for the interview.

resumeText.description: The text extracted from the resume.

status.description: The current status of the interview.

overallScore.description: The overall score for the interview.

createdAt.description: The time the interview was started.

Question.title: Interview Question
Question.description: A specific question generated for an interview.

id.description: The unique ID of the question.

interviewId.description: The ID of the interview this question belongs to.

order.description: The order of the question in the interview.

Answer.title: User Answer
Answer.description: The user's response to a question and its evaluation.

id.description: The unique ID of the answer.

answerText.description: The text of the user's answer.

score.description: The score for this specific answer (0-100).

improvedAnswer.description: AI-rewritten improved version of the answer.

createdAt.description: The time the answer was submitted.

UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Aggregated progress data for a user.

CodingProblem.title: Coding Problem
CodingProblem.description: A coding challenge for the user.

/interviews/{interviewId}/answers/{answe.description: User answers for a specific interview.
